keyPoints: Encryption: Protects data from unauthorized access
OS Security: Protects the host operating system from malware and unauthorized access
VM Security: Protects virtual machines from malware and unauthorized access
Shared Images: Pose risks due to potential malware presence, use secure images only
Management OS: Pose risks due to potential malware presence, use secure management OS only
XOAR: eXclude All Risks by implementing a Trusted Hypervisor
